title: Arkon
description: A Fabric modpack with a focus on performance, aesthetics, and minimal gameplay modifications.
body:
## Overview

Arkon is a fabric modpack that was originally created for use in Arkon SMP, but now works universally. It includes many performance optimization, quality of life, and aesthetic mods. There are also a few mods with more impact to gameplay. However, those mods are carefully chosen to avoid overcomplicating the game necessarily.

## Mod highlights

- Sodium, Indium, Starlight, Iris (Helps improve performance and introduces Optifine shader support)
- Yung's mods, Towns & Towers, Tectonic (Introduces more interesting worldgen and structures without creating a bunch of custom biomes)
- Aquamirae, Immersive Armors (Introduces a new ice environment with some bosses and equipment, but remains relatively minimal)
- Origins, Croptopia (Introduces simple new gameplay mechanics)
- Create (Allows for more complex machinery and automation without creating too many abstractions)

There are also a variety of mods designed specifically for server use, such as better keepinventory, anti x-ray, and vanish (of course, these will not impact your experience in singleplayer).
